episodes.title: “I Joined a Cult” | The SKULLS
episodes.description:
I tell the disturbing, but true story of how I joined the Skulls while in college. I describe many of the secret occult rituals and practices I was made to go through to join, and then offer a Biblical critique of such practices. The events described in the video are real and actually happened to me, though some details are omitted, some of the chronology differs from the actual events, some events that happened separately are merged into a single event, and the AI generated images in the video are not a 1 to 1 recreation of the actual events and are sometimes overly dramatized.

RECOMMENDATIONS IN ORDER OF MENTION

I hope the video edifies and builds up the Church of Christ. If you liked the material, feel free to subscribe to my channel for similar material in the future. I love all of you very much and I hope you're blessed in the Lord.

episodes.title: Jehovah's Witness Catch-22
episodes.description:
Jehovah's Witness Catch-22 - In this short video I discuss a catch-22 argument from the New World Translation that one can use to prove Jesus is God to the Jehovah's Witness that they encounter. The argument revolves around Revelation 22:13 and its speaker claiming to be both the Alpha & Omega, as well as the First & the Last.

Link to my new channel 'Christian Video Vault':
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtBvO5YdROe5CWU41KVde4Q
